text: This study aimed to explore the strategic internalization of Islamic educational values to nurture students’ characters at Inpres 2 Wagom Elementary School. Furthermore, this study examined the phases of planning, implementing, and evaluating the value-integration process. Based on the qualitative descriptive approach, the researcher collected the data by means of semi-structured interviews, observations, and documents. The researcher used audiovisual aids in order to make sure that the data collected were true and reliable. The source of primary data were the school principal and teachers. The researcher analyzed the data collected in several stages, namely data reduction, data display, and verification. The result of this research shows that the internalization of Islamic values at SD Inpres 2 Wagom was based on an overall evaluation of students’ understanding, appreciation, and manifestation of the values they had received. All in all, the values they received were expected to help them become worthy and competent individuals in the modern age.
